cataract: The image shows diffuse cloudiness and decreased red reflex, resembling cataract.
Scattered red or yellow lesions, cotton wool spots, and neovascularization are present, features more typical of diabetic retinopathy.
Enlarged optic cup and thinning of the neuroretinal rim are seen, mimicking glaucoma.
Microaneurysms, hemorrhages, and exudates are visible, resembling diabetic retinopathy.
Notching of the rim and peripapillary atrophy are present, features more typical of glaucoma.
diabetic_retinopathy: The image shows clear visualization of the optic disc and retinal vessels, resembling a normal retina rather than cataract.
Scattered red or yellow lesions, cotton wool spots, and neovascularization are present, features more typical of diabetic retinopathy.
Enlarged optic cup and thinning of the neuroretinal rim are seen, mimicking glaucoma.
Sharp disc margins and uniform color are present, which may be confused with a normal retina.
Microaneurysms, hemorrhages, and exudates are visible, resembling diabetic retinopathy.
glaucoma: The image shows clear visualization of the optic disc and retinal vessels, resembling a normal retina.
Scattered red or yellow lesions, cotton wool spots, and neovascularization are present, features more typical of diabetic retinopathy.
Diffuse cloudiness and decreased red reflex are seen, mimicking cataract.
Sharp disc margins and uniform color are present, which may be confused with a normal retina.
Microaneurysms, hemorrhages, and exudates are visible, resembling diabetic retinopathy.
normal_retina: The image shows clear visualization of the optic disc, macula, and vessels, resembling a normal retina.
Diffuse cloudiness and decreased red reflex are present, features more typical of cataract.
Enlarged optic cup and pale disc are seen, mimicking glaucoma.
Sharp disc margins and regular vascular patterns are present, which may be confused with a normal retina.
No signs of hemorrhages, exudates, or vascular changes are visible, resembling a normal retina.
